decoder_heading: Privacy Policy for the Roaming Squirrel Apps
ident_heading: Privacy Policy for the Roaming Squirrel Apps
heading_content_part: Privacy Policy for the Roaming Squirrel Apps (Version 12/2016)
OverviewThis Privacy Policy describes the information collected by Roaming Squirrel Apps ( "we", "us" or "our") through our mobile applications and how we use that information.

decoder_heading: Information that we obtain about you either directly or from other services
ident_heading: Information that we obtain about you either directly or from other services
heading_content_part: Information that we obtain about you either directly or from other services such as Google Analytics, Google Play and others. This information includes:Device information - device-specific information such as your hardware model, operating system version and unique device ID.Unique application numbers - certain services include a unique application number. This number and information about your installation (for example, the operating system type and application version number).

decoder_heading: Information that we obtain about you either directly or from other services
ident_heading: Information that we obtain about you either directly or from other services
heading_content_part: Anonymous identifiers - we use anonymous identifiers when you interact with services, such as advertising services and others.We comply with the Children's Online Privacy Protection ActOur mobile applications comply with the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act ("COPPA"). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 13 in violation of COPPA, and if in the event that a user identifies himself or herself as a child under the age of 13 through a support request, we will not collect, store or use, and will delete in a secure manner, any personal information of such user.

decoder_heading: How we use information that we collect
ident_heading: How we use information that we collect
heading_content_part: How we use information that we collect

decoder_heading: We use the information that we collect from all of our applications
ident_heading: We use the information that we collect from all of our applications
heading_content_part: We use the information that we collect from all of our applications to improve our applications and make them better for you.

decoder_heading: We may share aggregated, non-personally identifiable data with our partners
ident_heading: We may share aggregated, non-personally identifiable data with our partners
heading_content_part: We may share aggregated, non-personally identifiable data with our partners, such as publishers and advertisers. Our Privacy Policy may change from time to time. We will not reduce your rights under this Privacy Policy without your explicit consent. We will post any Privacy Policy changes on this page.
How to contact usAny questions regarding our Privacy Policy should be sent to:admin@roamingsquirrel.com
